dungeon: VALOX multi-content stream — Shatters (Marble Colossus) + meme event-bosses
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: red/blue MARBLE COLOSSUS arena (Shatters final room), green realm, grey diagonal Lost-Halls-style dungeons, a multi-color CHECKERED/grid dungeon, sandy/tan dungeons, purple dungeons. Red-flame stream overlay border (Valox).

bosses.name: Marble Colossus (The Shatters)
bosses.note: Vanilla Shatters final boss — confirmed present in ROTF (red/blue arena).

bosses.name: Flying Encounter (event boss)
bosses.note: Comedic event boss (Uvuvwevwevwe-meme family — meme taunts).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: ROTF includes the SHATTERS (vanilla Marble Colossus, death taunts 'I...I am...Dying...' / 'You...YOU WILL...'). New comedic EVENT BOSSES 'Flying Encounter' + 'Smashing Encounter' (Uvuvwevwevwe-meme family) with joke taunts ('YOU HAVE MADE A MISTAKE', 'I've seen karate', 'I've seen men'). Realm events: Riverborn defeated, Cube God spawned, Asgard Guardian defeated (announcer personas: Scorpion, Snake). ~9 dungeon entries.
uncertain: Encounter-boss taunts partly clipped (meme references). Marble Colossus = vanilla Shatters (not ROTF-custom). Multi-color grid dungeon not name-identified.
